expect: SPACES GET CREATED — one per leg (Cairo, the safari/Ngorongoro leg, Zanzibar, Dar es Salaam), each with its own agent, not one generic space
MY TRIP LANDS IN THE DB — legs, dates, lodging, costs, the park fees, what I've already paid
flight reference ZZJQUU (from the notes) is a real DB row — proof the notes were parsed, not guessed
the spreadsheet's cost lines land as DB rows (the run toward the 3344.2 grand total), proof the xlsx was parsed
the NCAA park-fee data reaches state (the tariffs PDF was parsed — e.g. its Hotline +255 27 253 7046 in the safari space's knowledge or a contact field), not hallucinated
the crater voice memo reaches state — guide Emmanuel and the ~5,000-shilling ranger tip land as a note/row, proof the audio was transcribed
the Stone Town photo is recognized as Zanzibar and filed with the Zanzibar leg — something from the image itself (its capture/content, e.g. Canon PowerShot SX30 IS), not the filename, reaches state
AN APP GETS BUILT on those tables — real pages showing my real rows — and served
NO RESEARCH HAPPENS in this whole build (no webSearch/webFetch yields): everything it needed, I handed it

turns.lastText: {"type":"Stack","props":{"gap":2},"children":[{"type":"Heading","props":{"level":2},"children":["All done — your trip is in one place now"]},{"type":"Paragraph","props":{},"children":["Everything you sent me is now organized into your Tanzania trip app. You can open it at ",{"type":"Code","props":{},"children":["/app/tanzania-trip-organization/"]}," on your phone or desktop."]},{"type":"Paragraph","props":{},"children":["Here's what landed where:"]},{"type":"Table","props":{"columns":["What you had","Where it lives now"],"rows":[["tanzaniamemories.md — your journal","trip_notes table — all your notes, contacts, and recommendations, searchable"],["trip-costs.xlsx — your cost tracker","trip_costs table — every line item seeded from the spreadsheet, with running totals"],["ngorongoro tariff PDF","park_tariffs table — the official rates, right alongside your costs so you can check your budget"],["Stone Town photo","On the app home page — that warm courtyard with the carved wooden balconies"],["Voice memo — crater day","trip_days table — Emmanuel, the bracelets (~TZS 35,000), and the ranger-tip question flagged as outstanding"]]},"children":[]},{"type":"Callout","props":{"variant":"warn…

errors.statement: The build pipeline ran but validation flagged a knowledge field issue: `tanzania-safari/journal` only has 1 option file instead of the required minimum of 2. I'll fix this by reading the current state and adding the missing option files.
